sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73792" key="o(mopo/lhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὁμο-πόλησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n73792.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">concordant revolution</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rotation,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg019:6:12" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Theol.Plat.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.12</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg019:p.378" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.378</biblScope> </bibl> P.).</sense> </entryFree>
